# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Workflow

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v3
      with:
        node-version: '16'

    - name: Build
      run: npm install && npm run build

    - name: Notify Build Result
      env:
        PR_TITLE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
        PR_BODY: ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}
      run: |
        echo "Build Complete for PR: $PR_TITLE"
        echo "PR Description: $PR_BODY"
        # Add your notification command here (e.g., Slack notification)

    - name: Create Commit with PR Title
      run: |
        git config --global user.name 'github-actions[bot]'
        git config --global user.email '41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com'
        git commit --allow-empty -m "Build for: $PR_TITLE"

    - name: Push Changes
      run: git push origin HEAD:refs/heads/${{ github.head_ref }}
